channel.title: Maine Legislature Bill Directory (current Legislature)
channel.description: Two-row-per-bill HTML table; monitored by full-page fingerprint rather than per-bill selectors because the row pairing isn't reducible to one CSS selector. Deliberately omits the 'snum' session-number query parameter: the Legislature's own site defaults this page to the current Legislature automatically (verified: fetching this URL with no snum returns the 132nd Legislature's bills as of mid-2026), so no manual update is needed when the 133rd Legislature convenes.
